SEARCH
Package pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest

Class ControllerHelper

java.lang.Object
pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.ControllerHelper
@Service public class ControllerHelper extends Object
Service class that provides utility functions for processing building structures. This helper acts as the bridge between the REST controller and the core logic, managing location searching, JSON validation, and Visitor orchestration.

  • Constructor Details

    • ControllerHelper

      public ControllerHelper()

  • Method Details

    • calculate

      public long calculate(String metric, String targetID, Building building)
      Calculating a specific metric for a target location.
      Parameters:
      metric - The type of calculation (area, cubature, heating, light).
      targetID - The hyphen-separated ID path in format buildingID-levelID-roomID with level and room optional.
      building - The building object to search within.
      Returns:
      The calculated value as a long.

    • locationHandler

      public Location locationHandler(Building building, ArrayList<String> locationIDs)
      Organize the location search and handles potential "Not Found" errors.
      Parameters:
      building - The root Building object.
      locationIDs - A list of IDs representing the hierarchy path.
      Returns:
      The found Location.
      Throws:
      org.springframework.web.server.ResponseStatusException - if the location does not exist.

    • findLocationExists

      public Location findLocationExists(Location location, ArrayList<String> targetIDs, int i)
      Recursively searches for a specific location within the building hierarchy.
      Parameters:
      location - The current node being inspected.
      targetIDs - The sequence of IDs to match.
      i - The current depth index in the targetIDs list.
      Returns:
      The matched Location, or null if not found.

    • visitorHandler

      public Visitor visitorHandler(String metric, Location location)
      Factory method that creates the appropriate Visitor for a metric and triggers the visit operation on a location.
      Parameters:
      metric - The string identifying the calculation type.
      location - The location to be visited.
      Returns:
      The Visitor after it has completed its calculations.

    • getOverheatedRoomsReport

      public String getOverheatedRoomsReport(long heatingThreshold, Building building)
      Generates and control a textual report of rooms where heating exceeds a certain limit.
      Parameters:
      heatingThreshold - The maximum allowed heating value.
      building - The building to analyze.
      Returns:
      A formatted string report.

    • findOverheatedRooms

      public ArrayList<Room> findOverheatedRooms(long heatingThreshold, Building building)
      Traverses the building to identify rooms exceeding the heating threshold.
      Parameters:
      heatingThreshold - The limit to check against.
      building - The building containing levels and rooms.
      Returns:
      A list of Room objects that are "overheated".

    • formatOverheatedRooms

      public String formatOverheatedRooms(ArrayList<Room> overheatedRooms)
      Formats a list of rooms into a readable report string using StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      overheatedRooms - List of rooms to report.
      Returns:
      A formatted multiline string.

    • verifyBuildingJSON

      public void verifyBuildingJSON(Building building)
      Validates that the provided building object is properly formed. Ensures that the building has levels and that each level contains rooms.
      Parameters:
      building - The building to verify.
      Throws:
      org.springframework.web.server.ResponseStatusException - if the building structure is empty or invalid.
